description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its leatherette upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory. Height: 34cm Width: 44cm Depth: 6cm Leatherette upper for durability A flap with a twist button closure One main compartment with a zippered pocket, a zippered separator and a mobile pouch Two short handles Zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
